refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the next term of the sequence

listitem.para: the number of terms to retrieve (default = 1)
a matrix of size imax x s, the next vector in the sequence

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a matrix of values with shape 1 x s, where s is the dimension of the space. The current object is updated after the call to next : both this and next are mandatory output arguments. This function is sensitive to the "-leap" option.

refsection.title: Examples
